# Research Navigator

# Development Roadmap

Version: 1.0

---

# Vision

Research Navigator aims to become an AI-powered Knowledge Navigation System capable of helping researchers understand an entire research domain from its mathematical foundations to the latest state-of-the-art developments.

Development is organized into milestones rather than fixed dates. Each milestone must be completed, tested and frozen before moving to the next.

---

# Current Version

Version

0.1

Current Stage

Foundation

---

# Development Philosophy

Every milestone follows the same lifecycle.

Planning

↓

Implementation

↓

Testing

↓

Documentation

↓

Freeze

↓

Next Milestone

Completed milestones should remain stable unless bug fixes or backward-compatible improvements are required.

---

# Milestone 0

Project Foundation

Objective

Establish the engineering foundation of the project.

Tasks

✅ Folder Structure

✅ README

✅ System Design

✅ Project Guide

✅ Master Prompt

✅ Knowledge Engine

✅ Database Engine (Core)

✅ JSON Knowledge Storage

✅ SQLite Integration

Deliverables

- Stable project structure
- Working Knowledge Engine
- Working Database Engine
- Documentation

Status

Completed

---

# Milestone 1

Knowledge Base

Objective

Populate the platform with high-quality structured knowledge.

Topics

□ Mathematics

□ Statistics

□ Probability

□ Linear Algebra

□ Calculus

□ Optimization

□ Machine Learning

□ Neural Networks

□ Deep Learning

□ Attention Mechanism

□ Transformers

□ Large Language Models

□ Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)

□ AI Agents

□ Multi-Agent Systems

Deliverables

- Gold Standard topic nodes
- Structured timelines
- FAQs
- Historical motivation
- Future research directions

Status

In Progress

---

# Milestone 2

Researcher Knowledge Base

Objective

Build comprehensive researcher profiles.

Each profile should contain

- Biography
- Timeline
- Major Contributions
- Research Areas
- Landmark Papers
- Collaborators
- Awards
- Influence

Initial Researchers

□ Blaise Pascal

□ Pierre de Fermat

□ Isaac Newton

□ Carl Friedrich Gauss

□ Thomas Bayes

□ Ronald Fisher

□ Arthur Samuel

□ Frank Rosenblatt

□ Geoffrey Hinton

□ Yann LeCun

□ Yoshua Bengio

□ Andrew Ng

□ Ashish Vaswani

□ Ilya Sutskever

□ Fei-Fei Li

Status

Planned

---

# Milestone 3

Paper Knowledge Base

Objective

Convert landmark papers into structured knowledge.

Each paper contains

- Motivation
- Problem Statement
- Methodology
- Contributions
- Results
- Limitations
- Future Work
- Related Papers

Initial Papers

□ Perceptron

□ Backpropagation

□ AlexNet

□ ResNet

□ Attention Is All You Need

□ BERT

□ GPT

□ GPT-2

□ GPT-3

□ Llama

Status

Planned

---

# Milestone 4

Knowledge Relationships

Objective

Connect every knowledge object.

Relationships include

Topic

↓

Researchers

↓

Papers

↓

Datasets

↓

Models

↓

Applications

↓

Future Research

Deliverables

- Relationship tables
- Knowledge graph foundation
- Cross-domain navigation

Status

Planned

---

# Milestone 5

Timeline Explorer

Objective

Build historical navigation.

Features

- Interactive timeline
- Historical milestones
- Research evolution
- Linked papers
- Linked researchers

Status

Planned

---

# Milestone 6

Knowledge Graph

Objective

Create an interconnected research graph.

Capabilities

- Parent topics
- Child topics
- Related concepts
- Cross-domain relationships
- Research paths

Status

Planned

---

# Milestone 7

Research Assistant

Objective

Develop an AI assistant capable of explaining the structured knowledge.

Current Models

- qwen3:4b
- llama3.2:3b

Capabilities

- Guided learning
- Research explanations
- Suggested next topics
- Research gap discovery
- Paper summaries

Status

Planned

---

# Milestone 8

Streamlit User Interface

Objective

Build an interactive desktop interface.

Features

- Knowledge Tree
- Timeline Explorer
- Researcher Explorer
- Paper Explorer
- Search
- Chat
- Visual Knowledge Graph

Status

Planned

---

# Milestone 9

Research Roadmaps

Objective

Generate personalized learning paths.

Example

Machine Learning

↓

Statistics

↓

Probability

↓

Linear Algebra

↓

Optimization

↓

Neural Networks

↓

Deep Learning

↓

Transformers

↓

LLMs

↓

---

# Milestone 10

Version 1.0 Release

Objective

Release the first stable version.

Requirements

- Stable Knowledge Engine
- Stable Database Engine
- Gold Standard Knowledge Base
- Knowledge Graph
- Timeline Explorer
- Research Assistant
- Streamlit Interface
- Complete Documentation

Status

Future

Version 2.0

Potential Features

- Multi-domain expansion
- Biomedical AI
- Finance

- Computer Vision

- Federated Learning

Version 3.0

Potential Features

- Multi-user collaboration
- Cloud synchronization
- Team research workspaces
- Citation management
- Interactive paper annotation
- AI-generated literature reviews

---

# Success Criteria

Research Navigator will be considered successful when it enables researchers to:

- Understand unfamiliar domains quickly.
- Explore historical evolution.
- Connect researchers and papers.
- Discover research gaps.
- Build structured learning paths.
- Navigate complex research ecosystems with confidence.

1.0
